description: Add phase PH-4 "Cross-cutting hardening & release" and bind slices SL-016 through SL-019 to it. This introduces structure absent from every v1 artifact, so it is recorded as a typed scope change before the mutation it authorizes, per the package's own progress-sync protocol. Authorized by DEC-029. No requirement, acceptance criterion or work item changes scope as a result; the four slices already existed in the roadmap ladder and had already shipped. The change is representational only.
